name: Sour Cream Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized bowl, mix together the dry ingredients: flour, salt, baking powder, and baking soda.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the sour cream, honey, melted butter, vanilla extract, milk, egg yolk, and egg white until smooth.
3. Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture and stir until just combined.
4. Preheat a griddle or frying pan over medium-low heat. When hot, add 1 teaspoon of butter and spread it evenly across the surface.
5. Using a 1/2 cup measure, pour batter onto the hot surface to form pancakes.
6. Cook until bubbles form on the surface of each pancake, about 1-2 minutes.
7. Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes on the other side.
8. Repeat with remaining batter, adding more butter as needed.
9. Serve hot with warmed maple syrup on the side.
